issue.message: Implicit dependencies of composables should be made explicit. Usages of hiltViewModel to acquire a ViewModel should be done in composable default parameters, so that it is more testable and flexible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#viewmodels for more information.

Implicit dependencies of composables should be made explicit. Usages of hiltViewModel to acquire a ViewModel should be done in composable default parameters, so that it is more testable and flexible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#viewmodels for more information.

Implicit dependencies of composables should be made explicit. Usages of hiltViewModel to acquire a ViewModel should be done in composable default parameters, so that it is more testable and flexible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#viewmodels for more information.

Implicit dependencies of composables should be made explicit. Usages of hiltViewModel to acquire a ViewModel should be done in composable default parameters, so that it is more testable and flexible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#viewmodels for more information.
Querying resource values using LocalContext.current
Querying resource values using LocalContext.current
Querying resource values using LocalContext.current

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

This @Composable function has a modifier parameter but it doesn't have a default value.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#modifiers-should-have-default-parameters for more information.

issue.message: This @Composable function has a modifier parameter but it doesn't have a default value.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#modifiers-should-have-default-parameters for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Using mutable objects as state in Compose will cause your users to see incorrect or stale data in your app.Mutable objects that are not observable, such as ArrayList<T> or a mutable data class, cannot be observed by Compose to trigger recomposition when they change.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-use-inherently-mutable-types-as-parameters for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [offsetY: Dp, contentColor: Color, direction: ArrowDirection, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, strokeWidth: Dp] but should be [offsetY: Dp, contentColor: Color, direction: ArrowDirection, strokeWidth: Dp, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [title: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: ButtonType = ButtonType.Primary, enabled: () -> Boolean = { true }, showIndeterminateProgress: () -> Boolean = { false }, progress: (() -> Float)? = null, onClick: () -> Unit, imageVector: ImageVector? = null] but should be [title: String, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: ButtonType = ButtonType.Primary, enabled: () -> Boolean = { true }, showIndeterminateProgress: () -> Boolean = { false }, progress: (() -> Float)? = null, imageVector: ImageVector? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [title: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: ButtonType = ButtonType.Primary, enabled: () -> Boolean = { true }, showIndeterminateProgress: () -> Boolean = { false }, progress: (() -> Float)? = null, onClick: () -> Unit, imageVector: ImageVector? = null] but should be [title: String, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: ButtonType = ButtonType.Primary, enabled: () -> Boolean = { true }, showIndeterminateProgress: () -> Boolean = { false }, progress: (() -> Float)? = null, imageVector: ImageVector? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [ColumnScope, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, otpCode: () -> String, updateOtpCode: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, isLoading: () -> Boolean, isInvalidVerificationCode: () -> Boolean] but should be [ColumnScope, otpCode: () -> String, updateOtpCode: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, isLoading: () -> Boolean, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isInvalidVerificationCode: () -> Boolean]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, label: String, initialValue: String, validatedRecipientsEmails: GetSetCallbacks<Set<String>>, onValueChange: (TextFieldValue) -> Unit, isError: Boolean = false, supportingText: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null] but should be [label: String, initialValue: String, validatedRecipientsEmails: GetSetCallbacks<Set<String>>, onValueChange: (TextFieldValue) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isError: Boolean = false, supportingText: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [content: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, @StringRes titleRes: Int? = null, @StringRes descriptionRes: Int? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier] but should be [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, content: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, @StringRes titleRes: Int? = null, @StringRes descriptionRes: Int? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [content: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, title: String?, description: String?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier] but should be [title: String?, description: String?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, content: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [filesDetailsViewModel: FilesDetailsViewModel = hiltViewModel<FilesDetailsViewModel>(), folderUuid: String, transferUuid: String, navigateToFolder: (String) -> Unit, withFilesSize: Boolean, withSpaceLeft: Boolean, navigateBack: () -> Unit, close: () -> Unit] but should be [folderUuid: String, transferUuid: String, navigateToFolder: (String) -> Unit, withFilesSize: Boolean, withSpaceLeft: Boolean, navigateBack: () -> Unit, filesDetailsViewModel: FilesDetailsViewModel = hiltViewModel<FilesDetailsViewModel>(), close: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, file: FileUi, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, isCheckboxVisible: Boolean, isChecked: () -> Boolean = { false }, onClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, onRemove: (() -> Unit)? = null, previewUriForFile: State<String?> = rememberUpdatedState(file.thumbnailPath), previewOverlay: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit = {}] but should be [file: FileUi, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, isCheckboxVisible: Boolean, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isChecked: () -> Boolean = { false }, onClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, onRemove: (() -> Unit)? = null, previewUriForFile: State<String?> = rememberUpdatedState(file.thumbnailPath), previewOverlay: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit = {}]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, isCheckboxVisible: Boolean, isChecked: () -> Boolean, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, onRemove: (() -> Unit)?, title: String, description: String, content: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit] but should be [isCheckboxVisible: Boolean, isChecked: () -> Boolean, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, onRemove: (() -> Unit)?, title: String, description: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, content: @Composable BoxScope.() -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, writeExternalStoragePermissionState: PermissionState? = null, files: List<FileUi>, isDownloadButtonVisible: Boolean, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, isCheckboxVisible: () -> Boolean, isUidChecked: (String) -> Boolean, setUidCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, onRemoveUid: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, navigateToFolder: ((uid: String) -> Unit)? = null, header: (@Composable LazyGridItemScope.() -> Unit)? = null, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi> = emptyFlow(), runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Unit = { _, _, _ -> awaitCancellation() }, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, direction: TransferDirection?] but should be [snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, files: List<FileUi>, isDownloadButtonVisible: Boolean, isRemoveButtonVisible: Boolean, isCheckboxVisible: () -> Boolean, isUidChecked: (String) -> Boolean, setUidCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, direction: TransferDirection?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, writeExternalStoragePermissionState: PermissionState? = null, onRemoveUid: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, navigateToFolder: ((uid: String) -> Unit)? = null, header: (@Composable LazyGridItemScope.() -> Unit)? = null, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi> = emptyFlow(), runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Unit = { _, _, _ -> awaitCancellation() }, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [file: FileUi, previewUri: String? = file.thumbnailPath, circleColor: Color, circleSize: Dp, showFileName: Boolean, fileIconContentPadding: PaddingValues = PaddingValues()] but should be [file: FileUi, circleColor: Color, circleSize: Dp, showFileName: Boolean, previewUri: String? = file.thumbnailPath, fileIconContentPadding: PaddingValues = PaddingValues()]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [paddingValues: PaddingValues = PaddingValues(0.dp), snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, files: List<FileUi>, navigateToFolder: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi> = emptyFlow(), runDownloadUi: suspend ( ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi ) -> Nothing = { _, _, _ -> awaitCancellation() }, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, withFileSize: Boolean, withSpaceLeft: Boolean, isDownloadButtonVisible: Boolean, onFileRemoved: ((uuid: String) -> Unit)? = null, direction: TransferDirection? = null] but should be [snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, files: List<FileUi>, withFileSize: Boolean, withSpaceLeft: Boolean, isDownloadButtonVisible: Boolean, paddingValues: PaddingValues = PaddingValues(0.dp), navigateToFolder: ((String) -> Unit)? = null, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi> = emptyFlow(), runDownloadUi: suspend ( ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi ) -> Nothing = { _, _, _ -> awaitCancellation() }, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, onFileRemoved: ((uuid: String) -> Unit)? = null, direction: TransferDirection? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [actualSize: Long, maxSize: Long, useIecUnits: Boolean = false, ttsFriendly: Boolean] but should be [actualSize: Long, maxSize: Long, ttsFriendly: Boolean, useIecUnits: Boolean = false]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, files: () -> List<FileUi>, canSendStatus: () -> CanSendStatus, pickFiles: () -> Unit, navigateToFilesDetails: () -> Unit] but should be [files: () -> List<FileUi>, canSendStatus: () -> CanSendStatus, pickFiles: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, navigateToFilesDetails: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, newTransferFabType: NewTransferFabType] but should be [newTransferFabType: NewTransferFabType, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, otpText: String, otpLength: Int, horizontalArrangement: Arrangement.Horizontal, onOtpTextChange: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, isCharacterValid: ((Char) -> Boolean)? = null, otpTextFieldStyle: OtpTextFieldStyle = OtpTextFieldStyle.default(), isError: () -> Boolean = { false }, isEnabled: () -> Boolean = { true }] but should be [otpText: String, otpLength: Int, horizontalArrangement: Arrangement.Horizontal, onOtpTextChange: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isCharacterValid: ((Char) -> Boolean)? = null, otpTextFieldStyle: OtpTextFieldStyle = OtpTextFieldStyle.default(), isError: () -> Boolean = { false }, isEnabled: () -> Boolean = { true }]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, @StringRes titleRes: Int] but should be [@StringRes titleRes: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, transfersViewModel: TransfersViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransfersViewModel>(), hasTransfer: (Boolean) -> Unit, onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit] but should be [navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, hasTransfer: (Boolean) -> Unit, transfersViewModel: TransfersViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransfersViewModel>(), onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onResendEmailCode: () -> Unit, enabled: () -> Boolean] but should be [onResendEmailCode: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, enabled: () -> Boolean]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, transfersViewModel: TransfersViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransfersViewModel>(), hasTransfer: (Boolean) -> Unit, onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit] but should be [navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, hasTransfer: (Boolean) -> Unit, transfersViewModel: TransfersViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransfersViewModel>(), onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [ColumnScope, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, transferLink: String, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState] but should be [ColumnScope, transferLink: String, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.
issue.errorLine1: fun ColumnScope.ShareAndCopyButtons(modifier: Modifier = Modifier, transferLink: String, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState) {

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isSelected: () -> Boolean = { false }, onClick: () -> Unit, contentPadding: PaddingValues = PaddingValues(0.dp), content: @Composable RowScope.() -> Unit] but should be [onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isSelected: () -> Boolean = { false }, contentPadding: PaddingValues = PaddingValues(0.dp), content: @Composable RowScope.() -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, file: FileUi, smallFileTileSize: SmallFileTileSize] but should be [file: FileUi, smallFileTileSize: SmallFileTileSize, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, contentShape: Shape, onSwiped: () -> Unit = {}, content: @Composable () -> Unit] but should be [contentShape: Shape, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onSwiped: () -> Unit = {}, content: @Composable () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, title: String, description: String? = null, positiveButton: @Composable () -> Unit, negativeButton: @Composable () -> Unit, onDismiss: () -> Unit, content: @Composable (ColumnScope.() -> Unit)? = null] but should be [title: String, positiveButton: @Composable () -> Unit, negativeButton: @Composable () -> Unit, onDismiss: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, description: String? = null, content: @Composable (ColumnScope.() -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, sheetState: SheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true), onDismissRequest: () -> Unit, imageVector: ImageVector? = null, title: String? = null, description: String? = null, topButton: @Composable ((Modifier) -> Unit)? = null, bottomButton: @Composable ((Modifier) -> Unit)? = null, content: @Composable (() -> Unit)? = null] but should be [onDismissRequest: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, sheetState: SheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true), imageVector: ImageVector? = null, title: String? = null, description: String? = null, topButton: @Composable ((Modifier) -> Unit)? = null, bottomButton: @Composable ((Modifier) -> Unit)? = null, content: @Composable (() -> Unit)? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, isSelected: () -> Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, onDismiss: () -> Unit] but should be [text: String, isSelected: () -> Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onDismiss: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [firstText: @Composable () -> Unit, secondText: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, color: Color = SwissTransferTheme.colors.secondaryTextColor, style: TextStyle = SwissTransferTheme.typography.bodySmallRegular] but should be [firstText: @Composable () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, secondText: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, color: Color = SwissTransferTheme.colors.secondaryTextColor, style: TextStyle = SwissTransferTheme.typography.bodySmallRegular]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [transferUuid: String, direction: TransferDirection, navigateBack: (() -> Unit)?, isApiV2Deeplink: Boolean? = null, transferDetailsViewModel: TransferDetailsViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransferDetailsViewModel>(), navigateToFolder: (folderUuid: String) -> Unit, onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit] but should be [transferUuid: String, direction: TransferDirection, navigateBack: (() -> Unit)?, navigateToFolder: (folderUuid: String) -> Unit, isApiV2Deeplink: Boolean? = null, transferDetailsViewModel: TransferDetailsViewModel = hiltViewModel<TransferDetailsViewModel>(), onDeleteTransfer: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [transferUrl: String, direction: TransferDirection, navigateBack: (() -> Unit)?, getTransfer: () -> TransferUi, runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi?) -> Nothing, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, getCheckedFiles: () -> SnapshotStateMap<String, Boolean>, clearCheckedFiles: () -> Unit, setFileCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, navigateToFolder: (folderUuid: String) -> Unit] but should be [transferUrl: String, direction: TransferDirection, navigateBack: (() -> Unit)?, getTransfer: () -> TransferUi, runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi?) -> Nothing, getCheckedFiles: () -> SnapshotStateMap<String, Boolean>, clearCheckedFiles: () -> Unit, setFileCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, navigateToFolder: (folderUuid: String) -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [ColumnScope, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, writeExternalStoragePermissionState: PermissionState?, getTransfer: () -> TransferUi, transferRecipients: Set<String>, isMultiselectOn: Boolean, getCheckedFiles: () -> SnapshotStateMap<String, Boolean>, setFileCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, navigateToFolder: ((folderUuid: String) -> Unit)? = null, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi>, runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Nothing, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }, direction: TransferDirection] but should be [ColumnScope, snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState, writeExternalStoragePermissionState: PermissionState?, getTransfer: () -> TransferUi, transferRecipients: Set<String>, isMultiselectOn: Boolean, getCheckedFiles: () -> SnapshotStateMap<String, Boolean>, setFileCheckStatus: (String, Boolean) -> Unit, transferFlow: Flow<TransferUi>, runDownloadUi: suspend (ui: TransferDownloadUi, transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Nothing, direction: TransferDirection, navigateToFolder: ((folderUuid: String) -> Unit)? = null, previewUriForFile: (transfer: TransferUi, file: FileUi) -> Flow<Uri?> = { _, _ -> emptyFlow() }]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [transfer: TransferUi, shape: Shape = CustomShapes.SMALL, isSelected: () -> Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit] but should be [transfer: TransferUi, isSelected: () -> Boolean, shape: Shape = CustomShapes.SMALL, onClick: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, direction: TransferDirection, navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, getTransfers: () -> GroupedTransfers, onDeleteTransfer: (String) -> Unit] but should be [direction: TransferDirection, navigateToDetails: (transferUuid: String) -> Unit, getSelectedTransferUuid: () -> String?, getTransfers: () -> GroupedTransfers, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onDeleteTransfer: (String) -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, transferOptionsStates: () -> List<TransferOptionState>, onClick: (TransferOptionType) -> Unit] but should be [transferOptionsStates: () -> List<TransferOptionState>, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: (TransferOptionType) -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [direction: TransferDirection, transferUuid: String? = null, isApiV2Deeplink: Boolean? = null, hideBottomBar: MutableState<Boolean>] but should be [direction: TransferDirection, hideBottomBar: MutableState<Boolean>, transferUuid: String? = null, isApiV2Deeplink: Boolean? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [exitNewTransfer: () -> Unit, illustration: ThemedImage = AppIllus.GhostScrollCrossPointing, title: String = stringResource(R.string.uploadErrorTitle) + if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) " Feur" else "", desc: String] but should be [exitNewTransfer: () -> Unit, desc: String, illustration: ThemedImage = AppIllus.GhostScrollCrossPointing, title: String = stringResource(R.string.uploadErrorTitle) + if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) " Feur" else ""]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Composables annotated with @Preview that are used only for previewing the UI should not be public.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#preview-composables-should-not-be-public for more information.
